1: Surar Al-Fatiha (Buɗe) — sura ta farko a cikin Alƙur'ani, ayoyi 7 Makkiyya da ake karantawa a kowace sallah. Tushen imani: yabo, ibada, da neman shiriya.
2: Surar Al-Baqara (Saniya) — sura mafi tsawo a Alƙur'ani da ayoyi 286, Madaniyya; imani, shari'a, tarihin Adamu da Ayatul-Kursi.
3: Surar Ali-Imran (Iyalin Imran) — ayoyi 200 Madaniyya akan zuriyar Imran, haihuwar Isa da Maryam, da yaƙin Uhudu.
4: Surar An-Nisa'i (Mata) — ayoyi 176 Madaniyya da ke tsara shari'ar aure, gado, haƙƙoƙin mata, marayu, da adalcin zamantakewa.
5: Surar Al-Ma'ida (Kwano) — ayoyi 120 Madaniyya akan shari'ar abinci, yarjejeniya da Krista da Hawariyyan Isa.
6: Surar Al-An'am (Dabbobi) — ayoyi 165 Makkiyya da ke ƙin shirka kuma ta tabbatar da kaɗaitakan Allah ta hanyar alamomin halitta.
7: Surar Al-A'raf (Masu Tsayi) — ayoyi 206 Makkiyya da ke ruwaito labarin Adamu, Nuhu, Hudu, Salihu, Luɗu, Shu'aibu da Musa.
8: Surar Al-Anfal (Ganima) — ayoyi 75 Madaniyya akan yaƙin Badr, dokokin yaƙi da rabon ganima.
9: Surar At-Tauba (Tuba) — ayoyi 129 Madaniyya akan yarjejeniyoyi, munafukai, da kira zuwa jihadi don gaskiya. Sura tilo ba tare da Bismillah ba.
10: Surar Yunusu — ayoyi 109 Makkiyya akan Annabi Yunusu, rahmar Allah, gaskiyar Alƙur'ani, da gargaɗi.
11: Surar Hudu — ayoyi 123 Makkiyya da ke ba da labarin Nuhu, Hudu, Salihu, Ibrahimu, Luɗu, Shu'aibu da Musa don gargaɗi ga kafirai.
12: Surar Yusuf — labarin mafi kyau a Alƙur'ani, ayoyi 111 Makkiyya da ke nuna cikakken rayuwar Annabi Yusuf.
13: Surar Ar-Ra'd (Tsawa) — ayoyi 43 da ke daukaka Allah ta alamomin yanayi — tsawa, walƙiya, duwatsu, koguna.
14: Surar Ibrahim — ayoyi 52 Makkiyya da ke girmama Annabi Ibrahim, addu'arsa, da sadaukar da Makkah da zuriyarsa ga Allah.
15: Surar Al-Hijr — ayoyi 99 Makkiyya akan mutanen Hijr, halittar Adamu, da ƙin Iblis ya yi sujada.
16: Surar An-Nahl (Ƙudan zuma) — ayoyi 128 Makkiyya akan ni'imomin Allah a halitta — ƙudan zuma, dabbobi, koguna, 'ya'yan itace — da aikin annabawa.
17: Surar Al-Isra'i (Tafiyar Dare) — ayoyi 111 Makkiyya da ke tuna tafiyar dare na Annabi Muhammad daga Makkah zuwa Kudus.
18: Surar Al-Kahfi (Kogo) — ayoyi 110 Makkiyya mai labarai huɗu: abokan kogon, gonaki biyu, Musa da Khidiru, da Zulƙarnaini.
19: Surar Maryam — ayoyi 98 Makkiyya don haihuwar mu'ujiza ta Isa da Maryam; haka kuma Zakariya, Yahaya, Ibrahim, Musa.
20: Surar Ta-Ha — ayoyi 135 Makkiyya ta sake fada duka labarin Musa: kiran dutsen, rikici da Fir'auna, da fita.
21: Surar Al-Anbiya'i (Annabawa) — ayoyi 112 Makkiyya ta bincika rayuwar da aikin annabawa 16 da saƙonsu na tauhidi.
22: Surar Al-Hajji (Aikin Hajji) — ayoyi 78 akan al'adun hajji, tsarkin Makkah da tunanin Ranar Ƙiyama.
23: Surar Al-Mu'minun (Muminai) — ayoyi 118 Makkiyya ta nuna halayyar muminai masu nasara da matakan halittar mutum bakwai.
24: Surar An-Nur (Haske) — ayoyi 64 Madaniyya akan tsabta, alaƙar iyali, 'Ayar Haske', da Allah a matsayin Hasken sammai da ƙasa.
25: Surar Al-Furƙan (Mai Banbance) — ayoyi 77 Makkiyya akan Alƙur'ani a matsayin ma'aunin gaskiya da ƙarya, da halayyar bayin Ar-Rahman.
26: Surar Ash-Shu'ara'i (Mawaƙa) — ayoyi 227 Makkiyya ta ba da labarin annabawa bakwai: Musa, Ibrahim, Nuhu, Hudu, Salihu, Luɗu da Shu'aibu.
27: Surar An-Naml (Tururuwa) — ayoyi 93 Makkiyya da Annabi Sulaiman, tururuwa, tsuntsu Hud-hud, da Sarauniyar Saba (Bilƙisu).
28: Surar Al-Ƙasas (Labarai) — ayoyi 88 Makkiyya akan rayuwar farko ta Musa a Misira, gudun hijirarsa zuwa Madyana, da dawowarsa ya fuskanci Fir'auna.
29: Surar Al-'Ankabut (Gizo-gizo) — ayoyi 69 tana amfani da gidan gizo-gizo a matsayin misali ga alloli na ƙarya; jarrabawar muminai.
30: Surar Ar-Rum (Rumawa) — ayoyi 60 Makkiyya ta yi hasashen nasarar Rumawa kuma ta yi tunani akan alamomin halitta.
31: Surar Luƙman — ayoyi 34 Makkiyya ta nuna nasihar Luƙman mai hikima ga ɗansa — nasihar iyaye mai zurfi.
32: Surar As-Sajda (Sujada) — ayoyi 30 Makkiyya akan halitta, tashin ƙiyama, da wahayi, da ayar sujada.
33: Surar Al-Ahzab (Ƙungiyoyi) — ayoyi 73 Madaniyya ta rufe yaƙin rami, iyalin Annabi, da jagoran rayuwar al'ummar Musulmi.
34: Surar Saba — ayoyi 54 Makkiyya ta kawo mulkin Saba da kyautai ga Daud da Sulaiman.
35: Surar Faɗir (Mahalicci) — ayoyi 45 Makkiyya ta girmama Allah a matsayin mahaliccin sammai da ƙasa, da mala'iku a matsayin manzanni.
36: Surar Ya-Sin — ayoyi 83 Makkiyya da ake kira 'Zuciyar Alƙur'ani', akan tashin ƙiyama, tauhidi, da wahayi.
37: Surar As-Saffat (Masu Lingaya) — ayoyi 182 Makkiyya ta yi rantsuwa da mala'iku masu tsayawa a sahu, da akan Nuhu, Ibrahim, Musa, Haruna, Ilyas da Yunusu.
38: Surar Sad — ayoyi 88 Makkiyya akan Daud, Sulaiman, Ayyuba, da ƙin Iblis ya yi sujada ga Adam.
39: Surar Az-Zumar (Ƙungiyoyi) — ayoyi 75 Makkiyya akan ibada tsabta, rahmar Allah fiye da yanke ƙauna, da ɗamarar Ranar Ƙiyama.
40: Surar Ghafir (Mai Gafara) — ayoyi 85 Makkiyya akan wani mumini a iyalin Fir'auna da ke shaidar gafarar Allah.
41: Surar Fussilat (An Ƙayyade) — ayoyi 54 Makkiyya akan bayyanannun ayoyin Alƙur'ani, da kasancewarsu magani da shiriya ga muminai.
42: Surar Ash-Shura (Shawara) — ayoyi 53 Makkiyya ta tsara shawara a matsayin tushen mulki mai kyau ga Musulmi.
43: Surar Az-Zukhruf (Kayan Ado Na Zinari) — ayoyi 89 Makkiyya ta yi gargaɗi ta hanyar misali akan dukiyar duniya kuma ta yi maganar Isa.
44: Surar Ad-Dukhan (Hayaƙi) — ayoyi 59 Makkiyya ta nuna hayaƙi a matsayin alamar Ranar Ƙiyama da halakar Fir'auna.
45: Surar Al-Jathiya (Durƙusa) — ayoyi 37 Makkiyya ta yi hasashen cewa al'ummai za su durƙusa a Ranar Ƙiyama.
46: Surar Al-Ahƙaf (Tsaunuka na yashi) — ayoyi 35 Makkiyya tana tuna halakar mutanen 'Ad da aljanu na sauraron Alƙur'ani.
47: Surar Muhammad — ayoyi 38 Madaniyya da ta tsara dokokin jihadi da halayyar muminai a lokacin yaƙi.
48: Surar Al-Fathi (Nasara) — ayoyi 29 Madaniyya ta sanar da yarjejeniyar Hudaibiyya a matsayin nasara bayyananniya akan Ƙuraishawa.
49: Surar Al-Hujurat (Ɗakuna) — ayoyi 18 Madaniyya da ta tsara ɗabi'un zamantakewa — magana, gulma, da 'yan'uwantaka.
50: Surar Qaf — ayoyi 45 Makkiyya ta tabbatar da gaskiyar tashin ƙiyama da hukunci da ƙarfi.
51: Surar Az-Zariyat (Iska Watsawa) — ayoyi 60 Makkiyya ta tabbatar da alkawuran imani kuma ta ambaci Ibrahim da Musa.
52: Surar Aɗ-Ɗur (Dutse) — ayoyi 49 Makkiyya ta yi rantsuwa da dutsen da littafi akan gaskiyar tashin ƙiyama.
53: Surar An-Najmu (Tauraro) — ayoyi 62 Makkiyya ta kawo labarin Mi'raji na Annabi da haɗuwarsa da Jibrilu.
54: Surar Al-Ƙamar (Wata) — ayoyi 55 Makkiyya tana farawa da mu'ujizar tsaga wata ta Annabi da halakar al'ummomin da suka shige.
55: Surar Ar-Rahman (Mai Rahma) — ayoyi 78 da ake kira 'Kyan Alƙur'ani' — tana lissafin ni'imomin Allah da 'Wace ne daga cikin ni'imomin Ubangijinku kuka ƙaryata?'
56: Surar Al-Waƙi'a (Mai Faruwa) — ayoyi 96 Makkiyya ta raba mutane zuwa ƙungiyoyi uku a Ranar Ƙiyama.
57: Surar Al-Hadid (Ƙarfe) — ayoyi 29 Madaniyya ta sanar da Allah a matsayin Farko da Ƙarshe, da kiran sadaukarwa don imani.
58: Surar Al-Mujadala (Matar Mai Gardama) — ayoyi 22 Madaniyya ta fara da ƙarar matar da Allah ya amsa, da dokar iyali.
59: Surar Al-Hashri (Tarawa) — ayoyi 24 Madaniyya akan korar ƙabilar Yahudu Banu Nadir daga Madina, da sunayen Allah 99.
60: Surar Al-Mumtahana (Matar da Aka Jarraba) — ayoyi 13 Madaniyya ta tsara mu'amala da muminai muhajirai da danginsu na kafirai.
61: Surar As-Saff (Sahu) — ayoyi 14 Madaniyya ta yaba muminan da ke yaƙi don imani kamar a sahu, kuma ta yi maganar Isa.
62: Surar Al-Jumu'a (Juma'a) — ayoyi 11 Madaniyya ta wajabta sallar Juma'a da barin kasuwanci lokacin da aka kirayi sallah.
63: Surar Al-Munafiƙun (Munafukai) — ayoyi 11 Madaniyya ta bayyana maƙiyan cikin gida — munafukai — a Madina.
64: Surar At-Taghabun (Asara ta Gaba ɗaya) — ayoyi 18 Madaniyya ta sunanta Ranar Ƙiyama a matsayin 'Ranar Asara ta Gaba ɗaya'.
65: Surar Aɗ-Ɗalaƙ (Saki) — ayoyi 12 Madaniyya ta tsara hanyoyin saki, lokacin jira, da mu'amala mai adalci.
66: Surar At-Tahrimu (Haramta) — ayoyi 12 Madaniyya tana magana akan rayuwar iyalin Annabi da matan da suke misali ga muminai.
67: Surar Al-Mulki (Mulki) — ayoyi 30 Makkiyya ana kiranta 'surar ceto', Ubangijinta Sarkin sammai bakwai.
68: Surar Al-Ƙalam (Alkalami) — ayoyi 52 Makkiyya ta yaba halayyar Annabi mai kyau kuma ta yi maganar Yunusu da misalin masu gonaki.
69: Surar Al-Haƙƙah (Wacce ba za a iya gujewa ba) — ayoyi 52 Makkiyya ta nuna gaskiyar tashin ƙiyama da halakar 'Ad da Thamud.
70: Surar Al-Ma'arij (Matakala) — ayoyi 44 Makkiyya tana bayyana matakan da mala'iku ke hawa zuwa Allah da Ranar Ƙiyama.
71: Surar Nuhu — ayoyi 28 Makkiyya ta kawo kiran Annabi Nuhu shekaru 950 ga mutanensa zuwa ga Allah ɗaya da ruwan tsufana.
72: Surar Al-Jinn (Aljanu) — ayoyi 28 Makkiyya ta ba da labarin aljanun da suka ji Alƙur'ani suka karɓi imani.
73: Surar Al-Muzzammil (Mai Lulluɓewa) — ayoyi 20 Makkiyya ta aika saƙo ga Annabi Muhammad game da sallar dare da haƙuri.
74: Surar Al-Muddaththir (Mai Tsulle) — ayoyi 56 Makkiyya ta yi kira ga Annabi bayan wahayi na farko don ya gargaɗi mutane.
75: Surar Al-Ƙiyama (Tashin Ƙiyama) — ayoyi 40 Makkiyya ta bayyana abubuwan da za su faru a Ranar Ƙiyama da gwagwarmayar rai da mutuwa.
76: Surar Al-Insan (Mutum) — ayoyi 31 Madaniyya ta bayyana halittar mutum, zaɓin 'yanci, da ladan Aljanna ga muminai.
77: Surar Al-Mursalat (Waɗanda Aka Aiko) — ayoyi 50 Makkiyya ta yi rantsuwa da iskokin da aka aiko a matsayin manzanni kuma ta yi hasashen Ranar Ƙiyama.
78: Surar An-Naba'i (Labari) — ayoyi 40 Makkiyya akan babban labari — Ranar Ƙiyama — da alamomin halittar Allah.
79: Surar An-Nazi'at (Masu Fitar) — ayoyi 46 Makkiyya tana magana akan mala'ikun da ke fitar da rayukan mutane da girman kan Fir'auna.
80: Surar 'Abasa (Ya Tsuke Goshinsa) — ayoyi 42 Makkiyya inda Allah ya yi tsawa ga Annabi don ƙin kula da makaho.
81: Surar At-Takwir (Naɗewa) — ayoyi 29 Makkiyya tana bayyana ƙarshen duniya da misalai masu ƙarfi — rana mai naɗewa, taurari masu faɗuwa.
82: Surar Al-Infiɗar (Farfashe) — ayoyi 19 Makkiyya tana bayyana sama mai farfashewa da kaburbura da aka juye.
83: Surar Al-Muɗaffifin (Masu Rage Ma'auni) — ayoyi 36 Makkiyya tana la'anta waɗanda ke rage ma'auni a ciniki.
84: Surar Al-Inshiƙaƙ (Tsagawa) — ayoyi 25 Makkiyya tana bayyana sama tana tsagewa tana bin Ubangijinta da abubuwan Ranar Ƙiyama.
85: Surar Al-Buruj (Gidaɗen Taurari) — ayoyi 22 Makkiyya ta ruwaito ƙonewar muminai a cikin rami da kariyar Allah.
86: Surar Aɗ-Ɗariƙ (Baƙon Dare) — ayoyi 17 Makkiyya tana bincika taurari da ke bayyana da dare da halittar mutum daga ruwa mai fita.
87: Surar Al-A'la (Maɗaukaki) — ayoyi 19 Makkiyya tana yaba sunan Allah maɗaukaki kuma tana bayyana muminai masu nasara.
88: Surar Al-Ghashiya (Mai Rufewa) — ayoyi 26 Makkiyya tana kiran abin rufewa na Ranar Ƙiyama kuma tana kwatanta Aljanna da Wuta.
89: Surar Al-Fajr (Alfijir) — ayoyi 30 Makkiyya ta yi rantsuwa da alfijir da dare goma, kuma ta yi maganar 'Ad, Thamud, Fir'auna.
90: Surar Al-Balad (Gari) — ayoyi 20 Makkiyya ta yi rantsuwa da birnin Makkah mai tsarki kuma ta bayyana gwagwarmayar rayuwar mutum.
91: Surar Ash-Shams (Rana) — ayoyi 15 Makkiyya ta yi rantsuwa da rana, wata da sama, kuma ta ruwaito halakar Thamud.
92: Surar Al-Lail (Dare) — ayoyi 21 Makkiyya ta yi rantsuwa da dare da rana kuma ta nuna banbancin kyauta da rowa.
93: Surar Aɗ-Ɗuhaa (Hantsi) — ayoyi 11 Makkiyya tana ta'aziyya ga Annabi Muhammad 'Ubangijinka bai bar ka ba'.
94: Surar Ash-Sharhi (Buɗe) — ayoyi 8 Makkiyya 'Ba mu buɗe maka ƙirjinka ba?' tana sanar da sauƙi bayan wahala.
95: Surar At-Tin (Baure) — ayoyi 8 Makkiyya ta yi rantsuwa da baure, zaitun da Dutsen Sinai, kuma ta nuna girman mutum.
96: Surar Al-'Alaƙ (Gudajin Jini) — ayoyi 19 Makkiyya: 'Karanta!' — wahayin farko ga Annabi.
97: Surar Al-Ƙadri (Ɗaukaka) — ayoyi 5 Makkiyya akan Daren Ɗaukaka da 'ya fi watanni 1000' lokacin da aka saukar da Alƙur'ani.
98: Surar Al-Bayyina (Shaidar Bayyananna) — ayoyi 8 Madaniyya tana tabbatar da Muhammad a matsayin shaida bayyananna ta Annabin Allah.
99: Surar Az-Zalzala (Girgizawa) — ayoyi 8 Madaniyya tana hasashen Ranar Ƙiyama lokacin da ƙasa za ta girgiza kuma ta fitar da sirrinta.
100: Surar Al-'Adiyat (Masu Gudu) — ayoyi 11 Makkiyya ta yi rantsuwa da dawakan yaƙi masu gudu kuma ta la'anta rashin godiya na mutum.
101: Surar Al-Ƙari'a (Mai Firgitarwa) — ayoyi 11 Makkiyya tana bayyana abin firgitarwa na Ranar Ƙiyama da mutane kamar ulu watsewa.
102: Surar At-Takathur (Ƙaruwa) — ayoyi 8 Makkiyya tana gargaɗi cewa ƙaruwa tana kai mutane zuwa kabari da tambaya.
103: Surar Al-'Asr (Lokaci) — ayoyi 3 Makkiyya: 'Dukkan ɗan adam cikin asara yake' — sai masu imani, aiki na gari, da haƙuri.
104: Surar Al-Humaza (Mai Zagi) — ayoyi 9 Makkiyya tana la'anta waɗanda ke zagin mutane da tara kuɗi.
105: Surar Al-Fil (Giwa) — ayoyi 5 Makkiyya akan Abraha wanda ya kawo sojoji masu giwa don rushe Ka'aba a shekarar haihuwar Annabi.
106: Surar Ƙuraish — ayoyi 4 Makkiyya tana yaba tsaron ƙabilar Ƙuraish da tafiye-tafiyen hunturu da bazara.
107: Surar Al-Ma'un (Abu Ƙaramin) — ayoyi 7 Makkiyya tana la'anta waɗanda ke ƙaryata addini kuma suke hana miskinai taimako.
108: Surar Al-Kauthar (Yalwa) — ayoyi 3, sura mafi gajere, ta sanar da Annabi kogi a Aljanna da yalwar ni'ima.
109: Surar Al-Kafirun (Kafirai) — ayoyi 6 Makkiyya: 'Kuna da addininku, ina da addinina' — raba da shirka.
110: Surar An-Nasr (Taimako) — ayoyi 3 Madaniyya da aka saukar lokacin Fathin Makkah, tana sanar da zuwan taimakon Allah.
111: Surar Al-Masad (Zaren Zare) — ayoyi 5 Makkiyya tana la'anta Abu Lahab, kawun Annabi, don ƙin imaninsa.
112: Surar Al-Ikhlas (Tsabta) — ayoyi 4 Makkiyya tana bayyana tauhidin Allah: 'Faɗa: Shi ne Allah, Ɗaya' — daidai da sulusin Alƙur'ani.
113: Surar Al-Falaƙ (Alfijir) — ayoyi 5 Makkiyya tana neman tsari daga Ubangijin alfijir daga sharri, sihiri da kishi.
114: Surar An-Nas (Mutane) — ayoyi 6 ta ƙarshe ta Alƙur'ani, tana neman mafaka ga Ubangijin mutane daga masu waswasi na aljanu da mutane.
